primary_changes: Subtask-6-1 status changed to 'completed' with detailed notes
Subtask-6-2 status changed to 'completed' with comprehensive documentation notes
Added 'last_updated' timestamp field to root object
file_insights.significance: Configuration file update marking completion of testing and documentation phase

patterns_discovered.pattern: Sequential subtask completion in final phase
patterns_discovered.observation: Phase 6 (Testing and Documentation) subtasks completed in order: make check → output/result.md
patterns_discovered.implication: Final phase subtasks are dependent and must be completed sequentially

patterns_discovered.observation: output/result.md includes multiple scenarios per command: normal cases, edge cases, flag variations
patterns_discovered.implication: Documentation should cover representative use cases and error conditions

patterns_discovered.observation: Test code Meta initializers required updates to include exit_code and paused_at fields
patterns_discovered.implication: Struct changes must cascade to all test fixtures and mocks

patterns_discovered.pattern: Code quality fixes alongside feature work
patterns_discovered.observation: Clippy warnings addressed (rfind vs filter().next_back()) and cargo fmt applied
patterns_discovered.implication: make check enforces both correctness and style; must fix before marking complete

gotchas_discovered.context: Tests were using old Meta struct initializers missing new fields
gotchas_discovered.impact: Test compilation failures until all Meta instantiations updated
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Added exit_code and paused_at to all test Meta structs

gotchas_discovered.impact: make check fails until code is refactored

gotchas_discovered.context: Command has --all flag which bypasses transient pattern filtering
gotchas_discovered.impact: Documentation must show both filtered and unfiltered behaviors
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Created separate examples for default and --all variants

approach_outcome.completion_notes: Subtask-6-2 marked as completed with comprehensive output/result.md documentation containing: (1) bop pause examples with multiple cards, empty state, and race condition handling; (2) bop resume examples with paused cards and empty state; (3) bop retry-transient examples showing single card retry, transient pattern filtering, --all flag behavior, and no-failures case. Also documented transient failure patterns and meta field updates.
approach_outcome.implementation_quality: high - includes edge cases and documented failure scenarios

recommendations.recommendation: Adopt structured example format (Normal Case, Edge Cases, Error States) for all command documentation
recommendations.rationale: Current output/result.md demonstrates value of comprehensive scenario coverage

recommendations.recommendation: When adding new struct fields, use a checklist to verify all test fixtures are updated
recommendations.rationale: Meta struct propagation issue could have been prevented with systematic review

recommendations.recommendation: Run make check before marking subtasks complete to catch clippy/fmt issues early
recommendations.rationale: Fixes were minimal but required iteration; early detection improves efficiency

recommendations.recommendation: For commands with flag variations, explicitly document flag interactions and behavior differences
recommendations.rationale: retry-transient --all flag significantly changes behavior; this must be clear in docs
